# Pattern Name

## Problem

What recurring problem, decision, or failure mode does this address?

## Use When

When should a future skill, project, or agent apply this?

## Pattern

What is the recommended approach?

## Anti-pattern

What should be avoided?

## Transfer

How does this apply to other skills, projects, plugins, or agents?

## Source

Where did this lesson come from?

## Last Verified

YYYY-MM-DD
